CopyImageSet.description: Grants permission to copy an image set

CreateDatastore.description: Grants permission to create a data store to ingest imaging data

DeleteDatastore.description: Grants permission to delete a data store

DeleteImageSet.description: Grants permission to delete an image set

GetDICOMBulkdata.description: Grants permission to get dicom bulkdata in binary format

GetDICOMImportJob.description: Grants permission to get an import job's properties

GetDICOMInstance.description: Grants permission to get dicom instance in dcm format

GetDICOMInstanceFrames.description: Grants permission to get dicom instance frames in format requested by the customer

GetDICOMInstanceMetadata.description: Grants permission to get dicom instance metadata in DICOM JSON format

GetDICOMSeriesMetadata.description: Grants permission to retrieve metadata for all DICOM instances belonging to a given DICOM series in DICOM JSON format

GetDatastore.description: Grants permission to get data store properties

GetImageFrame.description: Grants permission to get image frame properties

GetImageSet.description: Grants permission to get image set properties

GetImageSetMetadata.description: Grants permission to get image set metadata properties

ListDICOMImportJobs.description: Grants permission to list import jobs for a data store

ListDatastores.description: Grants permission to list data stores

ListImageSetVersions.description: Grants permission to list versions of an image set

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a medical imaging resource

SearchDICOMInstances.description: Grants permission to search dicom instances that returns data in DICOM JSON format

SearchDICOMSeries.description: Grants permission to search dicom series that returns data in DICOM JSON format

SearchDICOMStudies.description: Grants permission to search dicom studies that returns data in DICOM JSON format

SearchImageSets.description: Grants permission to search image sets

StartDICOMImportJob.description: Grants permission to start a DICOM import job

StoreDICOM.description: Grants permission to store dicom instances that returns result in DICOM JSON format

StoreDICOMStudy.description: Grants permission to store a dicom study that returns result in DICOM JSON format

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a medical imaging resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a medical imaging resource

UpdateImageSetMetadata.description: Grants permission to update image set metadata properties

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

medical-imaging:SeriesInstanceUID.description: Filters access by the SeriesInstanceUID parameter in the request

medical-imaging:StudyInstanceUID.description: Filters access by the StudyInstanceUID parameter in the request
